ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Glob pattern to control which files get transcribed. Default:
ast.target: 用于控制哪些文件被转录的 Glob 模式。默认值：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: to only transcribe files directly inside any

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 保存转录文本的位置。使用

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: to place each transcript next to its source file (default), or a folder name like
ast.target: 将每个转录文本放在其源文件旁边（默认），或使用文件夹名称如

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The header of every generated transcript. Use
ast.target: 每个生成的转录文本的标题。使用

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: as placeholders. The marker and transcript section are always appended automatically.
ast.target: 作为占位符。标记和转录部分会自动附加。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Required for PDF files and images. Canvas files work without a key. The free tier has a daily request cap, so a large vault may take several hours or a couple of days to fully transcribe on first run — that's normal.
ast.target: PDF 文件和图像所必需。Canvas 文件无需密钥即可工作。免费层有每日请求上限，因此大型库在首次运行时可能需要数小时或几天才能完全转录——这是正常现象。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The instruction sent to the AI for all PDF and image attachments. Changing this takes effect on the next transcription run.
ast.target: 发送给 AI 以处理所有 PDF 和图像附件的指令。更改此项将在下次转录运行时生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically transcribe new or changed files when Obsidian loads.
ast.target: Obsidian 加载时自动转录新的或已更改的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Same as above, but for mobile. Disabled by default — enable only after the initial transcription is done, as large vaults can take a while and may cause Obsidian to restart on mobile.
ast.target: 与上述相同，但适用于移动端。默认禁用——仅在初始转录完成后启用，因为大型库可能需要一段时间，并且可能导致 Obsidian 在移动端重启。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all settings to their default values.
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 API 密钥

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response.functionCall() is deprecated. Use response.functionCalls() instead.
ast.target: response.functionCall() 已弃用。请改用 response.functionCalls()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No Google API key configured - image parsing will be skipped
ast.target: 未配置 Google API 密钥 - 图像解析将被跳过

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No Google API key configured - PDF parsing will be skipped
ast.target: 未配置 Google API 密钥 - PDF 解析将被跳过

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Transcription is already in progress. Please wait.
ast.target: 转录已在进行中。请稍候。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在此处获取您的 API 密钥

ast.name: text
ast.source: No files tracked yet. Run the converter to see status.
ast.target: 尚未跟踪任何文件。运行转换器以查看状态。
